description: Sub-leasing agreement. Location: Damietta (אי כפתור). Dated: Monday, 8 Shevaṭ 4866 = 15 January 1106 CE. In which Musāfir b. ʿEli, the tax farmer of the dues from dyeing and selling silk in the district of Damietta, sub-leases his rights regarding a small town named Ibwān to three partners (the judge Yosef b. Avraham, and the brothers Daniel b. Yiṣḥaq ha-Ḥazzan and Ḥalfon b. Yiṣḥaq ha-Ḥazzan.) for the duration of one year against a payment of two dinars per month. Refers to his rights granted by 'the lofty rescript' (al-tawqīʿ al-ʿālī). Witnesses: Avraham Danafta (?), Peraḥya b. Ḥalfon ha-Meʿuttad ("the candidate," a yeshiva title), Mevorakh b. ʿAmram. (Information in part from Mediterranean Society, II, pp. 361, 362, 606.)
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בבודליאן אוקספורד.
